title: Elbląg, Warmian-Masurian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Elbląg, Warmian-Masurian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Elbląg is a city in Warmian-Masurian with a population of 119,317. A historic port city in northern Poland, connected to the Baltic Sea via the Elbląg Canal, with a charming old town and Gothic architecture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
